name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-42
title: install.py --all docstring claims to copy .claude/docs/specs and .claude/docs/plans but code does not
description: install.py header comment lines 8-9 say '--all also copy archive material (archive/, .claude/docs/specs/, .claude/docs/plans/, test/)'. The actual code at line 108-111 only copies 'archive' and 'test' subdirectories. The .claude/docs/specs and .claude/docs/plans handling lives in the OPPOSITE branch (lines 114-117) where non-all install REMOVES specs/*.md and plans/*.md. The docstring/help text misleads users into thinking --all preserves docs.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
